0.title: Requests Sum (by Region)
0.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries requests_sum_by_region = avg(cloud.aws.cloudfront.requests_sum_by_region), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(requests_sum_by_region) desc
| limit 20

1.title: TotalErrorRate Average (by Region)
1.query:
timeseries total_error_rate_average_by_region = avg(cloud.aws.cloudfront.total_error_rate_average_by_region), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(total_error_rate_average_by_region) desc
| limit 20
